hooks.command: bash -c 'set -e; J=$(cat); R=$(echo "$J" | jq -r .cwd); B=$(echo "$J" | jq -r .branch); REF=$(echo "$J" | jq -r .ref); P=$(echo "$J" | jq -r .path); N=${P##*/}; D="$R/.worktrees/$N"; mkdir -p "$R/.worktrees"; git -C "$R" worktree add -B "$B" "$D" "$REF" >&2; echo "$D"'
bash -c 'J=$(cat); R=$(echo "$J" | jq -r .cwd); P=$(echo "$J" | jq -r .path); git -C "$R" worktree remove --force "$P" >&2 || rm -rf "$P"'
